reviews.review_description: Like others, this is bugged on Oculus GO where the audio is running slow or something and generating a deep deep voice. I'm so freaking relieved to load it up on desktop and it was the original voice actor lol. Also the video could get choppy at points. I've not tried on my RIFT

developer_response.body: Sorry you experienced issues with audio slowdown.  We are still looking into the root cause of the issue, but it appears that a one-time reboot of the Oculus Go headset after installation of the Lone Echo II Trailer Experience does resolve this issue.

reviews.review_description: Will this be available on the guest and If so when

reviews.review_title: Great but sound messed up (slow audio)
reviews.review_description:
I just watched it on both the Oculus Go and the rift. The sound of oilia's voice was very deep on the Oculus Go version (Like audio in slow motion and transposed lower) something is bugged.. rift version on virtual desktop was fine.

Overall it looks fantastic. If Ready at Dawn is reading: Please add at least a couple Echo Combat style gun sections with enemies to break of the monotonous "put this over there" gameplay of the first game.

Please add some other NPC's you run into that are as detailed ad Olivia.

developer_response.body: Sorry you experienced issues with audio slowdown.  We are still looking into the root cause of the issue, but it appears that a one-time reboot of the Oculus Go headset after installation of the Lone Echo II Trailer Experience does resolve this issue.

reviews.review_description:
Although this is only a GO trailer, of sorts, for a Rift game, the 5K quality is wonderful!!
The "tease" part ...?  
Knowing the GO could very well have it's own version of "Lone Echo".
A pared-down version, sure.  But a very adequate one, nonetheless.
That said, this is more than worth the 2GB download.  Try it and see for yourself!
Amazing quality like others have said. I’m also having the issue where the audio is slowed down and out of sync. Would like to retry when it’s fixed

developer_response.body: Sorry you experienced issues with audio slowdown.  We are still looking into the root cause of the issue, but it appears that a one-time reboot of the Oculus Go headset after installation of the Lone Echo II Trailer Experience does resolve this issue.

reviews.review_description:
Hard to believe how good this looks on the Go. 

I had zero sound issues.
Great experience, but as others have said the sound is borked, wrong speed. And no, turning it off and on may have worked for the Hubble space telescope but not for me
Olivia looks like an androgynous like her voice ;-)

This is a step in the right direction as to what mobile vr can do. Now all we need the game itself for the oculus go. I hope that soon we we can get full games like this. This is fantastic. Audio is spot on with video. It makes me want to play this game on oculus go really bad.

Nice to see another 5k video!
If you have fps problem or sound just reboot your device

This has me super hyped for Lone Echo 2. I hope Oculus does more like this to hype the future Quest  launch titles. If we were to get a Vader Immortal trailer like this it would be immensely appreciated.
Best visuals on the Oculus Go to date, runs flawlessly on Go 64gb. Just a sit and watch for now, but a must to check out
The quality of the video is so good that it looks like real time 3d. This is how trailers for VR games should look like.
Audio out of sync and pitched down.

developer_response.body: Sorry you experienced issues with audio slowdown.  We are still looking into the root cause of the issue, but it appears that a one-time reboot of the Oculus Go headset after installation of the Lone Echo II Trailer Experience does resolve this issue.

reviews.review_title: Played lone echo now hyped for echo 2!
reviews.review_description: I played the first lone echo on pc and it takes the full advantage of the oculus rift which I loved! This trailer will get you hyped up for lone echo two if you played the first lone echo you will see some stuff from lone echo one just can’t wait! Who’s with me!
In my original review I noted an audio speed issue but after rebooting the Oculus Go, as suggested by the devs, the speed is good now and the video looks great.

developer_response.body: Sorry you experienced issues with audio slowdown.  We are still looking into the root cause of the issue, but it appears that a one-time reboot of the Oculus Go headset after installation of the Lone Echo II Trailer Experience does resolve this issue.

reviews.review_description: Good graphics that’s about it
Incredibly high-quality video.

reviews.review_title: nice，but why can't i play it on gear vr?
reviews.review_description: i want play it on my gear vr,thanks
This is amazing, beautiful, stunning..but it makes me wish I had a gaming PC and rift. If they figure out some way to put this one Quest I will love them forever
